creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Replying as maintainer of calibre.

BTW I stumbled on this bug report by chance. Due to how bugzilla works I was not notified of this bug. Please when submitting a bug and wanting to notify maintainers of various ports add them manually to the CC list.

It looks like the solution to this issue was to bump PORTREVISION, but since the time this bug was filed calibre was updated (and thus rebuilt) multiple times, so this issue is overcome by events.
